title: Board Owner Unable to edit/update
excerpt: I’m Super Admin, Owner of boards etc and I’m now finding I’m unable to add updates and edit items of boards I own. Any insight? TIA.

posts.author: HKRuth88 (Ruth Benny)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m Super Admin, Owner of boards etc and I’m now finding I’m unable to add updates and edit items of boards I own. Any insight? TIA.

posts.author: APICaptain (Calum Klesel)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you’re unable to add updates to items, that’s really strange.
I would check the permissions of the Workspace and also the affected boards first.

If no answers show up from checking those, are you able to add any updates to any items in your Monday.com account? (Check in another Workspace too)
If not, are you able to create a new board in the affected Workspace and add/edit/update items on it?
If not, are you able to create a new board in a new Workspace and add/edit/update items on it?

posts.author: sydnem (Taryn)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am experiencing the same issue. I created all the boards in my account, and I am the only Admin, yet when I try and select any item within a board, I am given a message saying I can only view. When looking at permissions, I am the owner.

This has just suddenly changed so am not sure if there is a bug or something.

Any help would be amazing, TIA
